meaning: International Telephone and Telegraph Corp. 美国国际电话电信公司(=IT&T)
examples: The team is now gearing up for a navigation payload PDR at ITT.
ITT is one of four companies competing for the Army's new helicopter protection contract.
Under the contract, ITT will modify the system for Turkish Air Force mission systems.
If ITT wins, Corning will be faced with instant competition from a knowledgeable well-financed tough competitor.
Bechtel, the engineering company, has subcontracted three wastewater jobs to ITT in Scotland in the past 18 months.
